# AGENTS.md — commander.js

The complete solution for node.js command-line programs (a CommonJS library, with ESM and
TypeScript typings shipped alongside). See `Readme.md` for usage; `docs/` for guides.

## Project layout

- `lib/*.js` — the library source (CJS). `index.js` is the entry; `esm.mjs` is the ESM wrapper.
- `typings/` — hand-written `.d.ts` / `.d.mts`.
- `tests/` — Jest test suite (`*.test.js`), plus `tests/esm-imports-test.mjs` for the ESM smoke test.
- `examples/` — runnable examples (not part of the test run).
- Config: `jest.config.js`, `eslint.config.js`, `.prettierrc.js`, `tsconfig*.json`.

## Environment setup  ✅ verified 2026-05-13

This project uses **npm** (committed `package-lock.json`; CI uses `actions/setup-node` with
`cache: 'npm'`). Node **≥ 20** (`engines.node`; CI tests on 20 / 22 / 24).

```sh
npm ci          # clean install from the lockfile
```

## Running tests  ✅ verified 2026-05-13

```sh
npm test                       # Jest + TS typings check (`jest && npm run check:type:ts`) — ~1400 tests
npx jest tests/options.test.js # one file
npx jest -t "some test name"   # by name
npm run test-all               # Jest + ESM import test + full check (lint/format/type) — the CI-equivalent
```

Jest config: `jest.config.js`. Tests live in `tests/`.

## Lint, format & type checks  ✅ verified 2026-05-13

```sh
npm run check        # check:type (tsc on JS + TS) + check:lint (eslint) + check:format (prettier --check)
npm run fix          # fix:lint (eslint --fix) + fix:format (prettier --write)
```

Individual: `npm run check:lint`, `npm run check:format`, `npm run check:type`.

## Conventions

- CommonJS (`"type": "commonjs"`); the ESM surface is just `esm.mjs` re-exporting.
- Typings are maintained by hand in `typings/` and tested with `tsd` — update them when the API changes.
- Run `npm run check` (or `npm run fix`) before committing; CI runs the full `check`.
- Add a `CHANGELOG.md` entry for user-visible changes.
